education.degree: Associate of Applied Science in Health Information Technology

experience.title: Healthcare Customer Service Representative
responsibilities: Provided customer service support to patients via phone and email regarding healthcare inquiries.
Assisted patients with scheduling appointments and navigating the patient portal.
Coordinated with healthcare providers to relay patient concerns and ensure timely follow-ups.
Learned basic medical terminology to better assist in patient interactions and inquiries.

response.summary: Dedicated healthcare professional with strong communication skills and foundational knowledge in health information technology. Experience in customer service within a healthcare setting, eager to leverage skills in a telehealth environment.
